summary: P0 Hero Selection UI Verification - All 6 test cases PASSED. Verified end-to-end that the Step 2 (CharactersStep) UI fix works correctly: checkboxes render OUTSIDE photo cards as siblings, villain-only and supporting-only selections enable Continue and advance to Step 3, hero-fallback mechanism works, and backend contract is enforced.
seed_data_creation: Test photos created dynamically during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero Selection UI fix verified. All 6 verification cases passed. The CharactersStep component correctly renders checkboxes OUTSIDE photo cards (siblings, not overlay), enables Continue with any role selection (Hero, Villain, or Supporting), and the frontend hero-fallback mechanism correctly promotes villain/supporting to hero_asset_id before POST /jobs.

pass_matrix.test_1_desktop_checkboxes_outside_photo: PASS - 3 checkboxes (Hero, Villain, Supporting) visible as siblings below photo card on desktop (1280x800)
pass_matrix.test_1b_mobile_checkboxes_outside_photo: PASS - 3 checkboxes visible on mobile (390x844), 44px tap targets, no overflow
pass_matrix.test_2_villain_only_selection: PASS - Selecting ONLY Villain enables Continue, advances to Step 3 (Template)
pass_matrix.test_3_supporting_only_selection: PASS - Selecting ONLY Supporting enables Continue, advances to Step 3 (Template)
pass_matrix.test_4_hero_fallback_mechanism: PASS - Backend accepts promoted villain/supporting as hero_asset_id, returns 200/201
pass_matrix.test_5_happy_path_explicit_hero: PASS - Explicit Hero selection returns 200/201 with job_id
pass_matrix.test_6_backend_contract_regression: PASS - POST /jobs without hero_asset_id returns 422 (Pydantic validation)

verification_evidence.desktop_checkbox_position: Checkboxes Y=520px, Photo Y=304px - checkboxes are BELOW photo (not overlay)
verification_evidence.mobile_tap_target: Hero checkbox 101.3x44px - meets 44px minimum tap target
verification_evidence.villain_only_flow: Continue button enabled after villain-only selection, advanced to trailer-step-template
verification_evidence.supporting_only_flow: Continue button enabled after supporting-only selection, advanced to trailer-step-template
verification_evidence.backend_422_on_missing_hero: POST /jobs with missing/null hero_asset_id correctly returns 422
